hook: Sometimes the most confident move is to stop converting low reciprocity into a challenge.
body: Pursuit can feel noble in your own head while quietly teaching you to ignore reality.

hook: Men who pride themselves on persistence can end up rewarding mixed behavior with even more effort.
body: Discernment means knowing when effort is courage and when it is denial.

hook: Discernment means knowing when effort is courage and when it is denial.
body: One clear ask can be brave. Repeatedly trying to warm up someone who keeps staying cold usually is not.

hook: One clear ask can be brave. Repeatedly trying to warm up someone who keeps staying cold usually is not.
body: Decide in advance what low reciprocity looks like so you can exit before pride starts renaming it.
